prompt: A hyper-realistic, dramatic macro shot of a solitary, bizarre plant. The plant has been optimized purely for height, resulting in a single, absurdly fragile and tall, needle-thin stem stretching endlessly upward. The stem is entirely devoid of leaves, color, or blossoms, looking skeletal, brittle, and strained, visibly buckling and warping under its own extreme height. The pursuit of height has destroyed its nature as a plant. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, photorealistic, uncanny atmosphere. No text, no numbers.
visual_logic: A plant selectively grown only for extreme height becomes a leafless, flowerless, brittle stalk buckling under its weight. Optimizing for a single, narrow vertical metric destroys the holistic integrity and original value of the organism.
